top_signals.title: Trump threatens to seize Kharg Island and other Iran oil infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.

top_signals.title: Truckload carriers eyeing multiyear rate upcycle
top_signals.summary:
Truckload carriers on hand at an investor conference this week laid out the thesis for a sustained period of rate recovery.

top_signals.title: AI mega-listings are 'just the start,' Razer CEO says, ahead of historic SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Blockbuster public offerings from AI companies could be an enduring feature of the industry, Razer CEO Min-Liang Tan said Thursday, ahead of several mega IPOs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

BT bags pay rise despite £3.7bn cost-cutting drive
top_signals.summary: BT chief executive Allison Kirkby received a £5.6m pay package last year, more than double the £2.5m she earned a year earlier, as the telecoms giant accelerated a sweeping cost-cutting programme designed to strip billions from the business. According to the FTSE 100 group’s annual report, Kirkby was paid £5.58m for the year to 31 [...]

top_signals.title: One year after Brian Wilson’s death: Beach Boys founder a genius like no other
top_signals.summary: A year ago today, Brian Wilson, the introverted, vulnerable genius behind the Beach Boys, died in his sleep at home in Beverly Hills. He was 82 years old, and his health was ruined: his death certificate included respiratory arrest, sepsis, cystitis, neurodegenerative disorder, obstructive sleep apnoea and chronic kidney disease. His mental state had long been [...]
